channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Latest Crimson Desert update rolls out extra polish and new tutorial quest
item.description: The day one Crimson Desert update is here and has a few much-needed tweaks.

item.title: Update your iPhone now — Apple issues a rare warning to iOS users as a new hacker threat is discovered
item.description: Apple has warned iOS users to update their iPhones to stay safe against a new hacker threat.

item.title: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale 2026: all of the latest deals
item.description: If you’re looking for the best time to get a deal this spring, it might very well be during Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, which kicks off at 3:01AM ET on March 25th and runs through 2:59AM ET on April 1st. Some early deals have already begun (we’re compiling them here), but we’ll also be highlighting […]

item.title: Sony removes a staggering 135,000 deepfake songs from music streaming services, but ‘labelling AI material is absolutely the next critical challenge’
item.description: Sony is battling against the rising threat of AI-generated music on streaming services, and now industry giants want clear AI tagging.

item.title: US and friends disrupt world's largest DDoS botnet responsible for record 31.4 Tbps global attacks
item.description: US law enforcement, with help from partners in Canada and Germany, disrupted four of the largest DDoS botnets.

item.title: Save $270 on the Dell Tower Plus: The best business computer we've tested is now $850
item.description: Upgrade your office for under $900 with this high-performance Dell business PC.

item.title: Google's best smartwatch ever just got a surprise price cut — get $100 off the outstanding Google Pixel Watch 4
item.description: We love the Google Pixel Watch 4 - and now it's even cheaper thanks to a record-low price at Amazon.

item.title: Walmart Wins Patents for AI-Powered Price Changes
item.description: The retailer denies it's engaging in dynamic pricing.

item.title: ByteDance is selling its Moonton game unit to Savvy Games for a cool $6 billion
item.description: Following discussions first reported on earlier this year, ByteDance has agreed to sell its games unit Moonton to Savvy Games Group for $6 billion. Moonton is known for mobile titles popular in Asia like Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, which has been downloaded 1.5 billion times. The transaction is set to be finalized in the "near future," according to an internal memo from Moonton's CEO seen by Bloomberg. ByteDance has been winding down its gaming arm and shopping Moonton since 2023, just two years after it first acquired the developer. Around that same period, the TikTok parent was shuttering it...

item.title: Epic Games has released a huge Fortnite Unreal Editor update that lets you design your own Star Wars islands, and now I'm yearning for Battlefront 3 even more than before
item.description: Epic Games has released a huge Fortnite Unreal Editor update that lets players create their own Star Wars islands.

item.title: 3 Million Teslas Get One Step Closer to a Recall Over Full-Self Driving Feature
item.description: Feds have moved into the “engineering analysis" phase of an investigation that began in 2024.

item.title: La Switch 2 s’apprête à accueillir Yoshi and the Mysterious Book et c’est ici qu’il est en précommande au meilleur prix
item.description: Annoncé en septembre 2025 pour mai 2026, Yoshi and the Mysterious Book est le 9e jeu centré sur le petit dinosaure vert à être disponible. S'il vous intéresse, sachez qu'il est en précommande à 51,99 euros sur Carrefour, en boîte, contre 59,99 euros pour une version dématérialisée.

item.title: This is the Windows 11 AI mini PC deal to beat - the Geekom A8 Max is a £575 beast for office and content creation
item.description: Missed the Spring Sale? I found my top Windows 11 mini PC a whole quid cheaper - but the deal ends soon.

item.title: ‘Work from home,’ encourages the world’s energy watchdog
item.description: Many organizations have called employees back to offices following Covid-related lockdowns, but the Iran war and ensuing energy crisis may quickly see workers returning to work from home. The International Energy Agency (IEA) - an energy watchdog established to help safeguard global power supplies following the 1970s oil crisis - is pushing for governments, businesses, […]...

item.title: Engadget Podcast: Why does everyone hate NVIDIA's DLSS 5 AI upscaling?
item.description: NVIDIA started an online firestorm this week when it announced DLSS 5 at its GTC conference. The company claims it's meant to deliver "photorealistic" lighting and materials in games by using neural processing. But it differs considerably from previous versions of DLSS, which were focused on using machine learning to upscale lower resolutions and generate additional frames, and gamers online aren’t too happy. To help us break this down, Anshel Sag, VP and principal analyst at Moor Insights and Strategy joins us to discuss his experience with NVIDIA's DLSS 5 demos. Also, we dive into what's nex...

item.title: How to get your grill ready for the outdoor season
item.description: If you're like me, you've absolutely had enough of winter and you're hoping warm weather is right around the corner. When it's finally more enjoyable to spend time outside, you're likely going to be cooking on the grill, so now is a great time to give everything a deep clean to prepare for your upcoming culinary adventures. I don’t blame you if you opted to let your grill hibernate during the winter months, but if that’s the case, it’ll probably need a tune-up before spring arrives. If you did keep the grill in working order over the last few months, this is a good time for a scrub and polish...

item.title: Is Daredevil in ‘Spider-Man: Brand New Day’? Charlie Cox Isn’t Saying Either Way
item.description: Matt Murdock is in New York, and Peter Parker is in New York; it would make sense, wouldn't it?

item.title: Best Kids' Bikes (2026): Woom, Prevelo, Guardian, and More
item.description: The WIRED Reviews team has kids, and we tested all types of kids’ bikes. Here are our top picks.

item.title: The best AI investment might be in energy tech
item.description: Power has become one of the biggest bottlenecks in rolling out new AI data centers. That's creating an opening for investors.

item.title: How to watch JioHotstar outside India – stream online and from anywhere with a VPN
item.description: Here's how to watch JioHotstar from outside India, and learn how to access streams from anywhere abroad with a VPN.

item.title: Blue Origin also wants to put AI data centers in space
item.description: Blue Origin has revealed its plans for an orbital AI data center system in a new filing with the Federal Communications Commission. The company has asked the agency for permission to deploy 51,600 satellites, as reported by the Wall Street Journal and SpaceNews. Called Project Sunrise, the initiative aims to launch and operate a constellation of satellites that can deliver computing capacity for artificial intelligence uses. Project Sunrise’s satellites will be placed in sun-synchronous orbits at altitudes between 311 and 1,118 miles. Each layer in the constellation will have between 300 to 1,...

item.title: Crimson Desert fails to boot for Intel Arc GPU users — and the developer's FAQ suggests referring to the refund policy
item.description: Pearl Abyss' new Crimson Desert is unplayable on PCs using Intel Arc GPUs, as the platform is currently unsupported.

item.title: China Approves the First Brain Chips for Sale—and Has a Plan to Dominate the Industry
item.description: While the United States and Europe are moving cautiously forward with clinical trials, China is racing toward the commercialization of brain implants.

item.title: 3 millions d’appareils piratés et 316 000 cyberattaques : ces 4 botnets géants ont fait des ravages avant d’être neutralisés
item.description: Quatre des botnets les plus redoutés au monde viennent d’être mis hors service. Au terme d’une vaste opération internationale, les autorités ont pu neutraliser les quatre réseaux d'appareils zombies. Ils sont à l'origine du piratage de trois millions d’objets connectés et du déploiement d'attaques DDoS record.

item.title: The best gaming deals to shop ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale — save on PS5, Xbox, and Nintendo Switch
item.description: Shop early gaming deals before Amazon's Big Spring Sale, including gaming monitors and video games for PS5, Xbox, Nintendo Switch.

item.title: Here’s how I write to make sure nobody thinks I’m an AI
item.description: Tricks to avoid sounding like an AI chatbot

item.title: BTS The Comeback Live | Arirang: How to watch, start time, livestream details
item.description: How to watch BTS The Comeback Live | Arirang on March 21 at 7 a.m. ET. The live concert streams exclusively on Netflix.

item.title: BTS fans, youve got to see Googles trivia quest
item.description: Google Search added a little surprise to mark BTS' release of 'Arirang,' the K-pop icons' first album in four years.

item.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 : ces nouveaux écouteurs stars de 2026 sont déjà en promo
item.description: Avec un design confortable et une batterie endurante, les Sony WF-1000XM6 pourront vous accompagner durant toutes vos sorties. Chez Boulanger, ils sont actuellement disponibles à 279,99 euros grâce au code VF20.

item.title: Anniversaire AliExpress : Switch 2, smartphones et caméras Insta360 sont à prix cassés [Sponso]
item.description: Ce 13 mars 2026 signe le début de la période anniversaire du géant de l'e-commerce AliExpress. Pendant neuf jours, les prix des meilleurs produits tech baissent considérablement grâce à divers codes promo. Voici les meilleures offres.

item.title: These AI notetaking devices can help you record and transcribe your meetings
item.description: These physical notetakers transcribe audio and give users summaries and action items of meetings using AI. Some even offer live translation.

item.title: 16 Best Camera Bags, Slings, Straps, and Backpacks (2026), Tested and Reviewed
item.description: Tote your photo and video gear around in style. We tested more than 100 packs and rounded up our favorites.

item.title: The best Pokémon deals to shop ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale: Trading cards at record lows
item.description: Shop early Pokémon deals before Amazon's Big Spring Sale, from TCG boxes and tins to discounted Nintendo Switch games.

item.title: Pokémon Pokopia has a hidden reward for completing the game's Pokedex, and you can even stumble upon part of the secret early on
item.description: Pokémon Pokopia has a secret reward, but players can only earn it if they complete their Pokedex first.

item.title: BTS SWIM video is already tearing up YouTube
item.description: BTS have released "Arirang" their first album in four years with lead single "SWIM'," which is already smashing YouTube charts.
